scripts.dev: npm run copy-examples && concurrently --names server,client --prefix-colors cyan,yellow "tsx watch backend/start.ts" "vite"
scripts.build: npm run copy-examples && npm run build:client && npm run build:server && npm run copy-examples-dist
scripts.build:server: tsc -p tsconfig.server.json && shx cp -r backend/data dist/data && shx mkdir -p dist/db && shx cp backend/db/schema.sql dist/db/
scripts.copy-examples: shx mkdir -p frontend/public/examples && shx cp -r ../../airfield-tests/examples/*.air frontend/public/examples/
scripts.copy-examples-dist: shx mkdir -p dist/client/examples && shx cp -r ../../airfield-tests/examples/*.air dist/client/examples/
